title: rosa × dumetorum var. suboxyphylla
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. suboxyphylla, also known as Rosa × dumetorum suboxyphylla, is a variety of rose bush that is a hybrid of Rosa dumetorum and Rosa rubiginosa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, derived from its flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. suboxyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
